category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a neofetch-like weather CLI; official README describes weather providers, current conditions, units, config, colors, and compact mode.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is stormy; official GitHub README title is stormy.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes installation, configuration, and usage sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/ashish0kumar/stormy; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README topics/features identify weather CLI, ASCII terminal display, providers, and Go implementation.
